page_metadata.biotools__summary: Open source software that is designed for the curation and analysis of metabolic models. It supports model version tracking, model annotation, data integration, data parsing and formatting, consistency checking, automatic gap filling, and model simulations.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Open source software that is designed for the curation and analysis of metabolic models. It supports model version tracking, model annotation, data integration, data parsing and formatting, consistency checking, automatic gap filling, and model simulations.
